data.name: ExpiryDate_AfterIssue
data.value: Expiry date must be after issue date

data.name: IssueDate_NotFuture
data.value: Document issue date cannot be in the future

data.name: File_SizeGreaterThanZero
data.value: File size must be greater than 0

data.name: File_TypeNotAllowed_ImagePdf
data.value: Only image files and PDFs are allowed (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, TIFF, PDF)

data.name: File_TypeNotAllowed_ImageOnly
data.value: Only image files are allowed (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, TIFF)

data.name: File_TypeNotAllowed_Full
data.value: Only image files, PDFs, Word documents, and audio recordings are allowed (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, TIFF, PDF, DOC, DOCX, MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A)

data.name: File_TypeNotAllowed_Evidence
data.value: File type not allowed. Accepted types: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP, TIFF, PDF, DOC, DOCX

data.name: FileHash_InvalidSha256
data.value: File hash must be a valid SHA-256 hex string (64 characters)

data.name: DocumentRef_MaxLength100
data.value: Document reference number cannot exceed 100 characters

data.name: Username_Length3to50
data.value: Username must be between 3 and 50 characters

data.name: Username_InvalidChars
data.value: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores

data.name: Password_MinLength8
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters

data.name: Password_RequireUpper
data.value: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter

data.name: Password_RequireLower
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter

data.name: Password_RequireDigit
data.value: Password must contain at least one digit

data.name: Password_RequireSpecial
data.value: Password must contain at least one special character

data.name: PasswordConfirm_Mismatch
data.value: Password confirmation does not match new password

data.name: Password_MustDiffer
data.value: New password must be different from current password

data.name: ModifiedByUserId_Required
data.value: Modified by user ID is required

data.name: FullNameAr_Required
data.value: Full name in Arabic is required

data.name: FullNameAr_MaxLength200
data.value: Full name in Arabic cannot exceed 200 characters

data.name: FullNameEn_MaxLength200
data.value: Full name in English cannot exceed 200 characters

data.name: Phone_SyrianFormat
data.value: Phone number must be in Syrian format: 0XXXXXXXXX or +963XXXXXXXXX

data.name: User_RequireAccess
data.value: User must have at least mobile or desktop access

data.name: Deactivation_ReasonMinLength10
data.value: Deactivation reason must be at least 10 characters

data.name: Permission_AtLeastOne
data.value: At least one permission must be specified

data.name: GrantReason_MinLength10
data.value: Grant reason must be at least 10 characters

data.name: RevokeReason_MinLength10
data.value: Revoke reason must be at least 10 characters

data.name: Governorate_DigitsOnly
data.value: Governorate code must contain only digits

data.name: District_DigitsOnly
data.value: District code must contain only digits

data.name: SubDistrict_DigitsOnly
data.value: Sub-district code must contain only digits

data.name: Community_DigitsOnly
data.value: Community code must contain only digits

data.name: Neighborhood_DigitsOnly
data.value: Neighborhood code must contain only digits

data.name: BuildingNumber_DigitsOnly
data.value: Building number must contain only digits

data.name: BuildingId_CompositeFormat
data.value: Composite Building ID must form exactly 17 digits (2+2+2+3+3+5)

data.name: PropertyUnits_NonNegative
data.value: Number of property units cannot be negative

data.name: PropertyUnits_Max500
data.value: Number of property units cannot exceed 500

data.name: Apartments_NonNegative
data.value: Number of apartments cannot be negative

data.name: Shops_NonNegative
data.value: Number of shops cannot be negative

data.name: Units_SumExceedsTotal
data.value: Sum of apartments and shops cannot exceed total number of property units

data.name: Latitude_SyriaBounds
data.value: Latitude must be between 32.0 and 37.5 (Syria bounds)

data.name: Longitude_SyriaBounds
data.value: Longitude must be between 35.5 and 42.5 (Syria bounds)

data.name: Longitude_SyriaBounds36
data.value: Longitude must be between 36.0 and 42.5 (Syria bounds)

data.name: LatLng_BothRequired
data.value: Both latitude and longitude must be provided together

data.name: Building_GeometryRequired
data.value: Building geometry (WKT polygon) is required for QGIS registration

data.name: GeometryWkt_MaxLength10000
data.value: Geometry WKT must not exceed 10,000 characters

data.name: GeometryWkt_InvalidFormat
data.value: Geometry WKT must be in valid format (POINT, POLYGON, etc.)

data.name: GeometryOrLatLng_Required
data.value: Either GeometryWkt or Latitude/Longitude must be provided

data.name: NorthEastLat_SyriaBounds
data.value: NorthEast Latitude must be between 32.0 and 37.5

data.name: SouthWestLat_SyriaBounds
data.value: SouthWest Latitude must be between 32.0 and 37.5

data.name: NorthEastLng_SyriaBounds
data.value: NorthEast Longitude must be between 36.0 and 42.5

data.name: SouthWestLng_SyriaBounds
data.value: SouthWest Longitude must be between 36.0 and 42.5

data.name: NorthEastLat_GreaterThanSouthWest
data.value: NorthEast Latitude must be greater than SouthWest Latitude

data.name: NorthEastLng_GreaterThanSouthWest
data.value: NorthEast Longitude must be greater than SouthWest Longitude

data.name: MaxResults_Max50000
data.value: MaxResults cannot exceed 50,000 for performance reasons

data.name: PolygonOrCoords_Required
data.value: Either PolygonWkt or Coordinates (minimum 3 points) must be provided

data.name: PolygonWkt_InvalidFormat
data.value: PolygonWkt must be a valid POLYGON WKT format

data.name: Polygon_MinPoints3
data.value: Polygon must have at least 3 coordinate points

data.name: Coordinate_Exactly2Values
data.value: Each coordinate must be an array of exactly 2 values [longitude, latitude]

data.name: Coordinate_SyriaRange
data.value: Coordinates must be within valid ranges (longitude: 35.0-43.0, latitude: 32.0-37.5 for Syria)

data.name: PageSize_Between1And1000
data.value: Page size must be between 1 and 1000

data.name: PageSize_Between1And100
data.value: Page size must be between 1 and 100

data.name: Governorate_Exactly2Digits
data.value: Governorate code must be exactly 2 digits

data.name: District_Exactly2Digits
data.value: District code must be exactly 2 digits

data.name: SubDistrict_Exactly2Digits
data.value: Sub-district code must be exactly 2 digits

data.name: Community_Exactly3Digits
data.value: Community code must be exactly 3 digits

data.name: Neighborhood_Exactly3Digits
data.value: Neighborhood code must be exactly 3 digits

data.name: BuildingId_DigitsOnly
data.value: Building ID must contain only digits

data.name: SortField_Invalid
data.value: Sort field must be one of: buildingId, createdDate, status, buildingType

data.name: District_RequiresGovernorate
data.value: District code requires Governorate code to be specified

data.name: SubDistrict_RequiresDistrict
data.value: Sub-district code requires District code to be specified

data.name: Community_RequiresSubDistrict
data.value: Community code requires Sub-district code to be specified

data.name: UnitId_MaxLength50
data.value: Unit identifier must not exceed 50 characters

data.name: UnitType_Range1to5
data.value: Unit type must be between 1 and 5

data.name: UnitStatus_ValidValue
data.value: Status must be a valid value (1-6 or 99)

data.name: FloorNumber_Range
data.value: Floor number must be between -5 and 200

data.name: Rooms_Range0to100
data.value: Number of rooms must be between 0 and 100

data.name: LastName_MaxLength100
data.value: Last name must not exceed 100 characters

data.name: FirstName_MaxLength100
data.value: First name must not exceed 100 characters

data.name: FatherName_MaxLength100
data.value: Father name must not exceed 100 characters

data.name: MotherName_MaxLength100
data.value: Mother name must not exceed 100 characters

data.name: NationalId_Exactly11Digits
data.value: National ID must be exactly 11 digits

data.name: BirthDate_NotFuture
data.value: Birth date cannot be in the future

data.name: Mobile_SyrianFormat
data.value: Mobile number must be in Syrian format: 09XXXXXXXX or +9639XXXXXXXX

data.name: Landline_SyrianFormat
data.value: Landline number must be in Syrian format: 0XXXXXXXXX or +963XXXXXXXXX

data.name: HouseholdSize_AtLeast1
data.value: Household size must be at least 1

data.name: Gender_SumExceedsHouseholdSize
data.value: Sum of male and female counts cannot exceed household size

data.name: Age_SumExceedsHouseholdSize
data.value: Sum of adult, child, and elderly counts cannot exceed household size

data.name: Disabled_ExceedsHouseholdSize
data.value: Disabled count cannot exceed household size

data.name: SurveyDate_NotFuture
data.value: Survey date cannot be in the future

data.name: ContactEmail_Invalid
data.value: Contact email is not a valid email address

data.name: Duration_GreaterThanZero
data.value: Duration must be greater than 0 minutes

data.name: GpsFormat_Invalid
data.value: GPS coordinates must be in format 'latitude,longitude' (e.g., '36.2021,37.1343')

data.name: PhotoFile_SizeExceedsMax
data.value: Photo file size cannot exceed {0} MB

data.name: DocFile_SizeExceedsMax
data.value: Document file size cannot exceed {0} MB

data.name: RevertReason_Required
data.value: A reason for reverting to draft is required.

data.name: RelationType_InvalidWithValues
data.value: Invalid relation type. Valid values: Owner, Occupant, Tenant, Guest, Heir, Other

data.name: RelationType_InvalidClaim
data.value: Invalid relation type. Owner=1, Occupant=2, Tenant=3, Guest=4, Heir=5, Other=99.

data.name: OwnershipShare_Required
data.value: Ownership share is required for Owner relation type

data.name: OwnershipShare_GreaterThanZero
data.value: Ownership share must be greater than 0

data.name: ContractDetails_MaxLength1000
data.value: Contract details must not exceed 1000 characters

data.name: TenureContractDetails_MaxLength1000
data.value: Tenure contract details must not exceed 1000 characters

data.name: EvidenceIdNotEmpty
data.value: Evidence ID must not be empty

data.name: EvidenceRelationIdNotEmpty
data.value: EvidenceRelation ID must not be empty

data.name: ClaimReason_Required
data.value: Reason for modification is required for audit purposes

data.name: ClaimReason_MinLength10
data.value: Reason must be at least 10 characters

data.name: EscalationReason_MaxLength2000
data.value: Escalation reason must not exceed 2000 characters.

data.name: JustificationReason_RequiredKeepSeparate
data.value: Justification reason is required for keep-separate decisions.

data.name: JustificationReason_RequiredMerge
data.value: Justification reason is required for merge decisions.

data.name: ResolutionReason_MaxLength2000
data.value: Resolution reason must not exceed 2000 characters.

data.name: ResolutionNotes_MaxLength4000
data.value: Resolution notes must not exceed 4000 characters.

data.name: ImportMethod_Invalid
data.value: Import method must be Manual, NetworkSync, WatchedFolder, or Sync

data.name: StagingRecordIds_Required
data.value: Staging record IDs are required when not approving all valid records.

data.name: StagingRecordIds_AtLeastOne
data.value: At least one staging record ID must be specified.

data.name: StagingRecordId_ValidGuid
data.value: Each staging record ID must be a valid GUID.

data.name: CancellationReason_MaxLength1000
data.value: Cancellation reason must not exceed 1000 characters.

data.name: QuarantineReason_MaxLength1000
data.value: Quarantine reason must not exceed 1000 characters.

data.name: ResetReason_Required
data.value: Reset reason is required for audit trail.

data.name: Assignment_AtLeastOneBuilding
data.value: At least one building must be specified for assignment

data.name: Assignment_Max100Buildings
data.value: Cannot assign more than 100 buildings at once

data.name: RevisitReason_Required
data.value: Revisit reason is required when property units are specified for revisit

data.name: Revisit_Max50Units
data.value: Cannot specify more than 50 property units for revisit

data.name: Priority_Invalid
data.value: Priority must be Normal, High, or Urgent

data.name: TargetDate_MustBeFuture
data.value: Target completion date must be in the future

data.name: AssignmentIds_AtLeastOne
data.value: At least one assignment ID must be provided.

data.name: AssignmentIds_MaxCount
data.value: A maximum of {0} assignment IDs may be acknowledged per request.

data.name: AssignmentId_ValidGuid
data.value: Each assignment ID must be a valid non-empty GUID.

data.name: VocabName_MaxLength100
data.value: Vocabulary name must not exceed 100 characters

data.name: VocabName_InvalidChars
data.value: Vocabulary name must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores

data.name: VocabDisplayNameAr_MaxLength200
data.value: Arabic display name must not exceed 200 characters

data.name: VocabDisplayNameEn_MaxLength200
data.value: English display name must not exceed 200 characters

data.name: VocabValues_AtLeastOne
data.value: At least one vocabulary value is required

data.name: VocabValueLabelAr_Required
data.value: Arabic label is required for each value

data.name: VocabValues_UniqueCodes
data.value: Vocabulary values must have unique codes

data.name: VocabChangeLog_MaxLength2000
data.value: Change log must not exceed 2000 characters

data.name: VocabImport_AtLeastOne
data.value: At least one vocabulary must be provided for import.

data.name: VocabImport_DuplicateNames
data.value: Duplicate vocabulary names in import batch.

data.name: VocabValueLabelAr_MaxLength200
data.value: Arabic label must not exceed 200 characters.

data.name: VocabValueLabelEn_MaxLength200
data.value: English label must not exceed 200 characters.

data.name: Identifier_PositiveInteger
data.value: Identifier must be a positive integer

data.name: LandmarkType_Range1to10
data.value: Landmark type must be between 1 and 10

data.name: LandmarkGeometry_Required
data.value: Location geometry (WKT point) is required for landmark registration

data.name: Landmark_AtLeastOne
data.value: At least one landmark is required.

data.name: SvgContent_InvalidTag
data.value: Content must be valid SVG (must contain svg tag).

data.name: StreetGeometry_Required
data.value: Street geometry (WKT linestring) is required for street registration

data.name: Street_AtLeastOne
data.value: At least one street is required.

data.name: JsonContent_InvalidFormat
data.value: Content must be valid JSON (must start with [ or {).

data.name: ImportedByUserId_Required
data.value: Imported by user ID is required.

data.name: PasswordPolicy_MinLength
data.value: Password minimum length must be between {0} and {1}.

data.name: PasswordPolicy_ExpiryDays
data.value: Password expiry must be between 0 (disabled) and {0} days.

data.name: PasswordPolicy_ReuseHistory
data.value: Password reuse history must be between 0 (disabled) and {0}.

data.name: PasswordPolicy_MinLengthNoComplexity
data.value: When no complexity requirements are set, minimum password length must be at least 12 characters.

data.name: Session_Timeout
data.value: Session timeout must be between {0} and {1} minutes.

data.name: Session_MaxFailedAttempts
data.value: Maximum failed login attempts must be between {0} and {1}.

data.name: Session_LockoutDuration
data.value: Lockout duration must be between {0} and {1} minutes.

data.name: Auth_AtLeastOneMethod
data.value: At least one authentication method must be enabled. Disabling all methods would lock out all users.

data.name: IpAllowlist_NotEmpty
data.value: IP allowlist cannot be empty when enforcement is enabled. This would block all admin access.

data.name: IpAllowlist_InvalidEntries
data.value: IP allowlist contains invalid IP addresses or CIDR notation.

data.name: IpDenylist_InvalidEntries
data.value: IP denylist contains invalid IP addresses or CIDR notation.

data.name: AllowedEnv_NotEmpty
data.value: Allowed environments cannot be empty when restriction is enabled.

data.name: EvidenceType_NotRecognized
data.value: Evidence type value is not a recognized enum member
